code:
def prime_factors(n):
    factors = []

    # Handle factor 2
    while n % 2 == 0:
        factors.append(2)
        n //= 2

    # Handle odd factors starting from 3
    i = 3
    while i * i <= n:
        while n % i == 0:
            factors.append(i)
            n //= i
        i += 2

    # If n is still greater than 1, it must be a prime factor itself
    if n > 1:
        factors.append(n)

    return factors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    number = int(input())
    result = prime_factors(number)
    print(result)
prompt: Girilen bir sayının asal çarpanlarını (Prime Factors) bulan bir kod bloğu oluştur.
